back_translation: Brothers and sisters, concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, and our being gathered to Him, we beseech you

Please do not let your thinking be quickly shaken or alarmed, whether by the inspiration of a spirit, or by spoken word, or by a letter claiming to come from us, which says that the day of the Lord has already arrived
Let no one deceive you in any way, for that day will not yet come, until the abandonment of faith occurs first, and the man of lawlessness is revealed — that is, the son of destruction
The one who opposes and lifts himself up above everything called god, or above any object of worship, to the point that he enters and sits in the temple of God, proclaiming himself to be God
Do you not remember that while I was still with you, I told you these things already?
And now you know what restrains him, so that he may be revealed at the time appointed for him
For the mystery of lawlessness is already at work, only that the one who restrains at present will continue to restrain, until that one is taken away from the midst
And then the lawless one will be revealed — the one whom the Lord Jesus will graciously slay with the breath of His mouth, and will graciously destroy completely by the appearing of His coming
His coming is in accordance with the working of Satan, with every kind of power, signs, and wonders that are false
and with every deception of unrighteousness toward those who are perishing, because they did not accept the love in the truth, which would have caused them to be saved
And for this reason, God therefore graciously sends to them the working of delusion, so that they may believe a lie
in order that all who do not believe the truth, but instead delight in unrighteousness, may be judged

But on our side, we are obligated to give thanks to God always because of you, beloved brothers and sisters of the Lord, because God has chosen you to be firstfruits unto salvation, in sanctification by the Spirit, and in faith in the truth
He has graciously called you to this through our gospel, so that you may receive a share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ
Therefore, brothers and sisters, stand firm and steadfast, and hold fast to the teaching that has been handed down, which you were taught — whether by spoken word or by our letter
May our Lord Jesus Christ Himself, and God our Father — the One who graciously loved us and graciously bestowed eternal encouragement and good hope by grace
graciously encourage your hearts, and graciously strengthen you in every good work and good word
